blockingIssues.description: BackfillSchedulerTests failure-path/success-path additions still bypass UsageAggregator.refreshAll and do not provide runtime proof that persistence failure prevents runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded execution.
New success-path coverage similarly does not execute UsageAggregator.refreshAll/runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded runtime path, so original scrutiny blocker remains unresolved.
BackfillCursorStore monotonic guard still allows negative-epsilon backward movement (diff >= -0.001), violating strict no-backward requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit transcript evidence for startup reads (mission.md, AGENTS.md, .factory/library/architecture.md, .factory/library/user-testing.md) before allowing followedProcedure=true in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observed missing AGENTS/library startup-read evidence in fix session 31663266-3c1a-4728-8f22-65355bf2bed7 despite followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh .factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md with token-accounting/backfill-specific guidance so workers are not directed by stale switcher-centric context.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer reported both library files remain switcher-focused and not aligned to m4 reconciliation/backfill implementation scope.
